Configuration & Queries Used: 

  {
    "slug": "firefox_112_vs_firefox_122",
    "histograms": [
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms",
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_from_responsestart_ms",
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_ms",
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_first_contentful_paint_from_responsestart_ms",
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.time_to_response_start_ms",
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.input_event_response_ms",
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.cycle_collector_max_pause",
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_max_pause_ms_2",
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.gc_ms",
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.js_pageload_execution_ms",
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.js_pageload_parse_ms",
        "payload.processes.content.histograms.js_pageload_baseline_compile_ms",
        "payload.histograms.fx_new_window_ms",
        "payload.histograms.fx_tab_switch_composite_e10s_ms",
        "payload.histograms.memory_total"
    ],
    "branches": [
        {
            "name": "Firefox112",
            "startDate": "2023-04-11",
            "endDate": "2023-05-09",
            "channel": "release",
            "version": 112,
            "conditions": [],
            "last": false,
            "ver_condition": "AND SPLIT(application.display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = \"112\""
        },
        {
            "name": "Firefox122",
            "startDate": "2024-01-23",
            "endDate": "2024-02-11",
            "channel": "release",
            "version": 122,
            "conditions": [],
            "last": true,
            "ver_condition": "AND SPLIT(application.display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = \"122\""
        }
    ],
    "pageload_event_metrics": {
        "fcp_time": [
            0,
            3000
        ],
        "load_time": [
            0,
            10000
        ],
        "response_time": [
            0,
            3000
        ],
        "js_exec_time": [
            0,
            3000
        ]
    },
    "segments": [
        "All",
        "Windows",
        "Linux",
        "Mac"
    ],
    "is_experiment": false
}
  

  with 
eventdata_Firefox112 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'fcp_time') AS int) AS fcp_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-04-11')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2023-05-09')
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "112"
),
aggregate_Firefox112 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox112" as branch,
    fcp_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox112
WHERE
    fcp_time > 0 AND fcp_time < 3000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
,
eventdata_Firefox122 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'fcp_time') AS int) AS fcp_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-11')
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "122"
),
aggregate_Firefox122 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox122" as branch,
    fcp_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox122
WHERE
    fcp_time > 0 AND fcp_time < 3000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox112
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox122
    )
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
eventdata_Firefox112 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'load_time') AS int) AS load_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-04-11')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2023-05-09')
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "112"
),
aggregate_Firefox112 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox112" as branch,
    load_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox112
WHERE
    load_time > 0 AND load_time < 10000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
,
eventdata_Firefox122 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'load_time') AS int) AS load_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-11')
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "122"
),
aggregate_Firefox122 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox122" as branch,
    load_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox122
WHERE
    load_time > 0 AND load_time < 10000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox112
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox122
    )
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
eventdata_Firefox112 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'response_time') AS int) AS response_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-04-11')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2023-05-09')
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "112"
),
aggregate_Firefox112 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox112" as branch,
    response_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox112
WHERE
    response_time > 0 AND response_time < 3000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
,
eventdata_Firefox122 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'response_time') AS int) AS response_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-11')
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "122"
),
aggregate_Firefox122 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox122" as branch,
    response_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox122
WHERE
    response_time > 0 AND response_time < 3000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox112
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox122
    )
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
eventdata_Firefox112 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'js_exec_time') AS int) AS js_exec_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-04-11')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2023-05-09')
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "112"
),
aggregate_Firefox112 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox112" as branch,
    js_exec_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox112
WHERE
    js_exec_time > 0 AND js_exec_time < 3000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
,
eventdata_Firefox122 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        SAFE_CAST((SELECT value FROM UNNEST(event.extra) WHERE key = 'js_exec_time') AS int) AS js_exec_time,
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.firefox_desktop.pageload`
    CROSS JOIN
      UNNEST(events) AS event
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-11')
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND SPLIT(client_info.app_display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "122"
),
aggregate_Firefox122 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    "Firefox122" as branch,
    js_exec_time as bucket,
    COUNT(*) as counts
FROM
    eventdata_Firefox122
WHERE
    js_exec_time > 0 AND js_exec_time < 3000
GROUP BY
    segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox112
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM aggregate_Firefox122
    )
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
Firefox112 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox112" as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-04-11')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2023-05-09')    
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms is not null
        AND SPLIT(application.display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "112"
),
bucketCounts_Firefox112 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    Firefox112,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
),
histogram_Firefox112 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    bucketCounts_Firefox112
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
,
Firefox122 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox122" as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-11')    
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_ms is not null
        AND SPLIT(application.display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "122"
),
bucketCounts_Firefox122 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    Firefox122,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
),
histogram_Firefox122 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    bucketCounts_Firefox122
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
SELECT 
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM histogram_Firefox112
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM histogram_Firefox122
    ) s
ORDER BY 
    segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
Firefox112 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox112" as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_from_responsestart_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-04-11')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2023-05-09')    
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_from_responsestart_ms is not null
        AND SPLIT(application.display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "112"
),
bucketCounts_Firefox112 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    Firefox112,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
),
histogram_Firefox112 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    bucketCounts_Firefox112
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
,
Firefox122 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox122" as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_from_responsestart_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-11')    
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.perf_page_load_time_from_responsestart_ms is not null
        AND SPLIT(application.display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "122"
),
bucketCounts_Firefox122 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    Firefox122,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
),
histogram_Firefox122 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    bucketCounts_Firefox122
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
SELECT 
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM histogram_Firefox112
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM histogram_Firefox122
    ) s
ORDER BY

FROM
    bucketCounts_Firefox112
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
,
Firefox122 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox122" as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.js_pageload_parse_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-11')    
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.js_pageload_parse_ms is not null
        AND SPLIT(application.display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "122"
),
bucketCounts_Firefox122 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    Firefox122,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
),
histogram_Firefox122 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    bucketCounts_Firefox122
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
SELECT 
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM histogram_Firefox112
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM histogram_Firefox122
    ) s
ORDER BY 
    segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
Firefox112 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox112" as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.js_pageload_baseline_compile_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-04-11')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2023-05-09')    
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.js_pageload_baseline_compile_ms is not null
        AND SPLIT(application.display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "112"
),
bucketCounts_Firefox112 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    Firefox112,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
),
histogram_Firefox112 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    bucketCounts_Firefox112
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
,
Firefox122 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox122" as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.processes.content.histograms.js_pageload_baseline_compile_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-11')    
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.processes.content.histograms.js_pageload_baseline_compile_ms is not null
        AND SPLIT(application.display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "122"
),
bucketCounts_Firefox122 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    Firefox122,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
),
histogram_Firefox122 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    bucketCounts_Firefox122
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
SELECT 
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM histogram_Firefox112
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM histogram_Firefox122
    ) s
ORDER BY 
    segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
Firefox112 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox112" as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.histograms.fx_new_window_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-04-11')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2023-05-09')    
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.histograms.fx_new_window_ms is not null
        AND SPLIT(application.display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "112"
),
bucketCounts_Firefox112 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    Firefox112,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
),
histogram_Firefox112 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    bucketCounts_Firefox112
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
,
Firefox122 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox122" as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.histograms.fx_new_window_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-11')    
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.histograms.fx_new_window_ms is not null
        AND SPLIT(application.display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "122"
),
bucketCounts_Firefox122 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    Firefox122,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
),
histogram_Firefox122 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    bucketCounts_Firefox122
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
SELECT 
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM histogram_Firefox112
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM histogram_Firefox122
    ) s
ORDER BY 
    segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
Firefox112 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox112" as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.histograms.fx_tab_switch_composite_e10s_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-04-11')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2023-05-09')    
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.histograms.fx_tab_switch_composite_e10s_ms is not null
        AND SPLIT(application.display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "112"
),
bucketCounts_Firefox112 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    Firefox112,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
),
histogram_Firefox112 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    bucketCounts_Firefox112
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
,
Firefox122 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox122" as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.histograms.fx_tab_switch_composite_e10s_ms, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-11')    
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.histograms.fx_tab_switch_composite_e10s_ms is not null
        AND SPLIT(application.display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "122"
),
bucketCounts_Firefox122 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    Firefox122,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
),
histogram_Firefox122 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    bucketCounts_Firefox122
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
SELECT 
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM histogram_Firefox112
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM histogram_Firefox122
    ) s
ORDER BY 
    segment, branch, bucket
  

  with 
Firefox112 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox112" as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.histograms.memory_total, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2023-04-11')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2023-05-09')    
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.histograms.memory_total is not null
        AND SPLIT(application.display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "112"
),
bucketCounts_Firefox112 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    Firefox112,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
),
histogram_Firefox112 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    bucketCounts_Firefox112
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
,
Firefox122 as (
    SELECT
        normalized_os as segment,
        "Firefox122" as branch,
        JSON_EXTRACT(payload.histograms.memory_total, '$.values') as hist
    FROM
        `moz-fx-data-shared-prod.telemetry.main`
    WHERE
        DATE(submission_timestamp) >= DATE('2024-01-23')
        AND DATE(submission_timestamp) <= DATE('2024-02-11')    
        AND normalized_channel = "release"
        AND normalized_app_name = "Firefox"
        AND payload.histograms.memory_total is not null
        AND SPLIT(application.display_version, '.')[offset(0)] = "122"
),
bucketCounts_Firefox122 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    SAFE_CAST(key AS float64) as bucket,
    INT64(PARSE_JSON(hist)[key]) as count
FROM
    Firefox122,
    UNNEST(bqutil.fn.json_extract_keys(hist)) as key
),
histogram_Firefox122 as (
SELECT
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    SUM(count) as counts
FROM
    bucketCounts_Firefox122
GROUP BY
   segment, branch, bucket
ORDER BY
    segment, branch, bucket
)
SELECT 
    segment,
    branch,
    bucket,
    counts
FROM
    (
        SELECT * FROM histogram_Firefox112
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM histogram_Firefox122
    ) s
ORDER BY 
    segment, branch, bucket
